testsuite.name: com.trustsign.core.TextVerifyServiceTest
testsuite.system-out:
Content before <START-SIGNATURE> length: 16 chars, 16 bytes Signature algorithm: SHA256withRSA only
no: SHA256withRSA + exact (as in file) (16 bytes) no: SHA256withRSA + strip trailing 
 (15 bytes) no: SHA256withRSA + normalize 
 to 
 then use (16 bytes) no: SHA256withRSA + normalize then strip trailing 
 (15 bytes) no: SHA256withRSA + raw bytes from file (before sig) (16 bytes)
TextVerifyService.verify() result: false - Signature invalid or content has been modified
